artifacts.summary: Firecrawl-first discovery found official AI tools, guidance, and approved-tools pages for QS 1-10 universities; one NUS library guide candidate was rejected as low-specificity discovery noise.

targets.sourceTitle: Generative AI tools available at MIT
Generative AI Tools | AI Competency Centre
Policy for Use of AI in Teaching and Learning
More secure generative AI tool available for staff and students
Generative AI - Information Management Systems and Services

stopConditions: Stop once each QS 1-10 university has at least one official AI tools or AI guidance source candidate.
Do not infer named tool availability from generic AI policy language.

artifacts.title: QS 1-10 AI Tools OpenClaw Draft
artifacts.summary: Converted 21 staged tool records across 10 QS universities into standard OpenClaw claim/evidence artifacts using source-backed evidence only.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Converted from staging tool records; review before publication.
